name: minerva-search-process

outputs.description: The name of the endpoint on which the process was run. Minerva.Process.SHA256 The SHA256 hash of the process.
outputs.name: Minerva.Process.Endpoint

outputs.description: The process command line. Minerva.Process.Username The user name with which the process was executed.
outputs.name: Minerva.Process.CommandLine

outputs.description: date The time the process was created. Minerva.Process.Pid
outputs.name: Minerva.Process.Createtime

outputs.description: The process ID. Minerva.Process.Name The process name.
outputs.name: number
